posts.author: Zalayeta (Mathieu)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I created a link column on my items which work fines but when in automation I copy these items to a new board I can’t keep the link column (or didn’t find how to do so). Could you let us pick the precedent value of link like all others fields?

Cheers,
